calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-02-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Julia M. Adams, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation.
Harleen Arora, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Dartanian Lambert.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on February 22, 2019.
Defendant's answer was filed on February 28, 2019.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on March 13, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, April 2, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation, and against defendant Dartanian Lambert, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $3,773.00.
Holdover Damages - $156.09.
Costs - $365.00.
Total: $4,294.09.

Additionally, plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 385 Eddy Street, #404, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The rental agreement is canceled and the lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-02-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Adrian Colley; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management is present. Represented by
Attorney Julia Adams appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dartanian Lambert is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of April 2, 2019 remains on calendar.
